title: Filestorage
content:
# Filestorage

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### list_files(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], data: Optional[Union[requests.FilesList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.FileStorage], responses.FilesListPaginatedCursor]

List the files currently present in the filestorage


### upload_file(file: str, metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.FileUpload

Upload a file


### delete_file(file_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Deletes the requested file from filestorage


### download_file(file_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Iterator[bytes]

Downloads the requested file


### get_file(file_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.FileGet

Fetches the information for a specific file

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.filestorage.list_files()
